positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical depiction of cosmic flora and fauna, featuring bioluminescent glowing jellyfish drifting among intricate root systems and crystalline hexagonal structures. The main subject is a vibrant, central grouping of fantastical, glowing, abstract plant life (luminous orchids, crystalline moss, glowing vines) suspended in a deep, nebula-filled void. The style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and ethereal bio-luminescence, rendered with bold, clean silhouettes and strong contrast. Use a palette dominated by deep indigo, electric teal, luminous cyan, and pops of glowing neon magenta. Composition must be central and highly scalable for textile printing. Studio shot quality, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, vector artwork quality, crisp lines.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, artifact, ugly, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, low detail, low resolution, signature, grainy, grayscale, monochrome
